title: Signature Hall of Fame
description: Performance Interpreting was inducted into Signature's Hall of Fame — the highest recognition in the BSL interpreting industry — for outstanding contribution to interpreting services and Deaf access.

title: Landmark Legal Precedent
description: Our testimony in the landmark Little Mix BSL case helped establish that BSL access at live events is a legal requirement under the Equality Act 2010 — not optional. That ruling changed the industry.

title: Trusted for National Moments
description: Selected to manage and deliver full Deaf access for Royal events and state ceremonies — including BSL interpreting, live captions and induction loop systems across multiple venues.

title: Proactive Access at Wembley
description: Working with Wembley Stadium to provide BSL interpreting at every event as standard — without waiting for a customer request. Proactive access at the national stadium. By default, not by exception.

title: The PI Events App
description: A free app for Deaf attendees — find interpreted events, see interpreter names, use on-site support tools, and share feedback. No other interpreting service offers this.
